description: Demo Brand Academy member profiles for marketing content and storytelling

featured_members.name: Filip Matić
featured_members.scouting_report: Technically gifted midfielder with excellent vision. Draws comparisons to Modrić for his ball retention under pressure. Ready for first-team minutes.
featured_members.marketing_notes: Strong Modrić comparison angle. Born in Zagreb, academy since age 8. Perfect 'homegrown talent' story.

featured_members.name: Ivan Škorić
featured_members.scouting_report: Commanding presence. Excellent in the air and reading of the game. Ball-playing CB with composure on the ball. top performer-like profile.
featured_members.marketing_notes: top performer comparison generates interest. Physical presence makes for great visual content.

featured_members.name: Luka Jurić
featured_members.scouting_report: Explosive pace and trickery. Loves to cut inside on his left foot. Needs to improve defensive work rate but has all the tools to be special.
featured_members.marketing_notes: Most exciting prospect. Skill videos perform extremely well on TikTok and Reels. Photogenic and charismatic - natural content creator.

featured_members.name: Marko Pavlović
featured_members.scouting_report: Clinical finisher with excellent movement. Physical striker who can hold up play and bring others in. Golden Boot winner at U19 level.
featured_members.marketing_notes: Goal machine. Every goal is a content piece. U19 Golden Boot narrative is compelling.

featured_members.name: Ante Tomašević
featured_members.scouting_report: Outstanding shot-stopper with excellent reflexes. Good distribution and comfortable with the ball at feet. Leadership qualities.
featured_members.marketing_notes: Spectacular saves make for viral content. Captain of U19 - leadership angle.

featured_members.name: Petar Radić
featured_members.scouting_report: Metronome in midfield. Exceptional positional awareness for his age. Dictates tempo and breaks up opposition attacks. Needs more physicality.
featured_members.marketing_notes: Tactical intelligence angle. Good for analytical/tactical content series.

featured_members.name: Josip Babić
featured_members.scouting_report: Dynamic left-back with excellent delivery. Engine that never stops. Good balance of defensive discipline and attacking threat.
featured_members.marketing_notes: Dual nationality angle connects to regional market. Tireless running style is inspiring.

featured_members.name: Niko Horvat
featured_members.scouting_report: Creative genius. Two-footed with incredible imagination. Sees passes others don't. Family moved from London for him to join the academy. Special talent.
featured_members.marketing_notes: Moved from London to join Demo Brand Academy - great 'choosing Demo Brand' narrative. Dual nationality connects to European market. Both-footed highlight reels.

featured_members.name: Domagoj Knežević
featured_members.scouting_report: Lightning-fast right-back with end-to-end quality. Excellent crosser and improving defender. Raw athleticism is exceptional.
featured_members.marketing_notes: Speed stats and sprint challenges. Athletic content performs well.

featured_members.name: Karlo Mandić
featured_members.scouting_report: Box-to-box midfielder with an engine. Excellent long passing range and work rate. Captain material with vocal leadership on the pitch.
featured_members.marketing_notes: Leadership and determination angle. Good interview subject - articulate and passionate.

featured_members.name: Dino Perić
featured_members.scouting_report: Left-footed CB with excellent reading of the game. Calm under pressure. Physical development still needed but tactical intelligence is advanced.
featured_members.marketing_notes: Long-term prospect. Include in academy group content.

featured_members.name: Antonio Vlašić
featured_members.scouting_report: Direct and fearless winger. Loves to take on defenders. Has improved his end product significantly this season. Physical and quick.
featured_members.marketing_notes: Exciting to watch. Not related to Nikola Vlašić but same surname generates search interest. Highlight reel material.

featured_members.name: Leon Marinić
featured_members.scouting_report: Goal machine at U15 level. Moved from European academy to Demo Brand. Natural finisher with intelligence beyond his years.
featured_members.marketing_notes: Came FROM German academy TO Demo Brand - reversal of usual pathway. Strong narrative for academy quality. German diaspora connection.

featured_members.name: Bruno Živković
featured_members.scouting_report: Agile and brave goalkeeper. Excellent penalty saver. Shot-stopping ability is elite for his age. Distribution needs work.
featured_members.marketing_notes: Penalty save specialist angle. Highlight reel of saves generates views.

featured_members.name: Matej Kovačević
featured_members.scouting_report: Left-footed playmaker with silky technique. Excellent ball control and weight of pass. Needs to develop physically but has all the technical attributes.
featured_members.marketing_notes: Beautiful technique makes for aesthetically pleasing content. 'The next...' narrative potential.

featured_members.name: Tomislav Barišić
featured_members.scouting_report: Explosive pace and direct running. Arrived from international academy program. Brings international discipline with local flair. Versatile on the right side.
featured_members.marketing_notes: Swedish-Local dual nationality. Connects to Swedish diaspora market. Speed metrics impressive for social content.
